nodeData.text: Wine Label Validation & Advertising Production Workflow

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
Integrate the image [image1] realistically onto the wine bottle [image2].

Strictly preserve the original label design: typography, proportions, colors, and visual hierarchy must remain unchanged. Do not modify or reinterpret any text or graphic elements.

Place the label with a clear, uniform margin from the left, right, top, and bottom edges, as seen on real premium wine labels.
The label must not reach or touch the bottle’s edges.

Adapt the label to the natural curvature of the bottle using a subtle, realistic cylindrical distortion.

Ensure centered alignment, appropriate scale for commercial wine bottles, and clean edges with slight natural paper imperfections.

Apply soft, realistic glass reflections over the label surface without compromising legibility.

Do not add new illustrations, text, or artistic stylization.

The final result should resemble a real product photograph, suitable for packaging validation and advertising use.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
Use the image 1 as the main product and integrate it naturally within a stratified stone formation.

The bottle should appear embedded among rock fragments, as if emerging directly from its place of origin.
The stones should feature a dominant [TERRACOTA] tone, with natural variations, rough textures, and visible mineral layers, maintaining a realistic and organic appearance.

The composition should be clean and frontal, with the bottle clearly readable and the label fully visible.
Apply controlled, dramatic lighting with soft shadows to enhance rock volume and subtle reflections on the glass.

Do not alter the bottle shape or the label design.
Do not add graphic elements, extra text, or artificial stylization.

The final image should resemble a premium wine advertising photograph inspired by origin and terroir, with an editorial-quality aesthetic.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
Use image 1 as the main product and place it partially embedded within the trunk of a tree, as if the tree had naturally grown around the bottle over time.

The bottle should appear naturally encased within the bark, with parts of the trunk gently surrounding the sides and back of the glass, without covering the label.
The integration must be realistic and believable, avoiding any surreal or forced effects.

The tree texture should display deep cracks, organic grain, and strong relief, suggesting age and solidity, while being treated as a studio still-life, not an outdoor scene.

The bottle must appear clean, sharply defined, and clearly separated from the background, with the label fully visible, centered, and perfectly legible, free of dirt or obstructive shadows.

Apply studio lighting, soft and directional, with controlled reflections on the glass and precise shadows that reinforce depth and volume between the bottle and the bark.

Do not alter the bottle shape or label design.
Do not add text, typography, graphic elements, or artistic effects.

The final image should resemble a premium advertising photograph, where the bottle feels physically integrated into the tree, communicating origin, roots, and the passage of time, with a clean, contemporary editorial aesthetic.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
Use the image 1 as the main product and place it horizontally, partially buried in natural soil, viewed from a top-down (overhead) perspective.

The bottle should appear lying flat on the ground, with part of its body covered by loose soil, as if placed or revealed within the terrain, not emerging vertically.

The camera must be positioned directly above the product, creating a flat, graphic composition similar to an editorial overhead photograph.

The soil should feature a dominant [SOIL_COLOR] tone, with realistic organic texture, irregular grain, and small natural fragments.
Avoid muddy appearance, excessive dirt, or artificial dramatization.

Keep the label clean, visible, and fully legible, clearly contrasting with the soil texture.

Apply soft, controlled lighting without harsh shadows, maintaining a clean, premium aesthetic.

Do not alter the bottle shape or label design.
Do not add graphic elements, extra text, or artificial stylization.

The final image should resemble a top-down premium wine advertising photograph, focused on origin and terroir, with a contemporary editorial feel.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
Use image 1 as the main product in a creative studio still-life scene.

The bottle should appear balanced, slightly tilted or visually suspended, supported by physical elements that represent the wine’s flavor profile.
These elements act as real points of support, visually holding the bottle in place.

The supporting elements should include:

Chocolate (solid bar or fragments, matte texture)

Red fruits (blackberries, raspberries, or cherries, stylized and not juicy)

Wood (dry branches, wood cross-sections, or barrel staves)

Minerals (stone, slate, or compact mineral fragments)

All elements must be carefully balanced, forming a sculptural composition that supports the bottle without cluttering the scene or obscuring the label.

The scene should be built on a two-tone background:

Base: warm beige / soft sand tone

Background: deep petrol green

Lighting must be pure studio lighting, soft yet precise, with clean, controlled shadows.
The bottle and label must be perfectly sharp, centered, and fully legible, with no harsh reflections or distortions.

Do not alter the bottle shape or label design.
Do not add text, typography, or graphic elements.

The final image should resemble a contemporary advertising photograph, where the physical balance of the bottle directly represents the wine’s flavor balance, with a premium editorial aesthetic.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
Use image 1 as the main product in a creative studio still-life scene.

The bottle should appear balanced, slightly tilted or visually suspended, supported by elegant masculine objects that act as real points of support within the composition.

The supporting elements should include a curated selection of:

Men’s tie or pocket square (matte fabric, subdued tones)

Men’s watch (steel, leather, or classic finishes, no excessive shine)

Men’s bracelet (leather, metal, or dark beads)

Men’s rings (simple shapes, dark or brushed metals)

Men’s wallet (aged leather or smooth leather, no visible logos)

All elements must be sculpturally balanced, visually supporting the bottle without obscuring the label or cluttering the scene.

The scene should be built on a two-tone background:

Base: warm beige / soft sand tone

Background: deep petrol green

Lighting must be pure studio lighting, with controlled shadows, refined contrast, and soft reflections on the glass.
The label must be perfectly sharp, centered, and fully legible.

Do not alter the bottle shape or label design.
Do not add text, typography, or graphic elements.

The final image should resemble an editorial advertising photograph, where the balance of the bottle expresses refined, contemporary masculine style.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
Use image 1 as the main product.

The bottle is shown mid-impact against a compact earth surface, captured in a frozen high-speed moment.
The bottle is slightly tilted diagonally, partially surrounded by earth and dust.

A dense cloud of brown soil, fine dust, and small rock fragments explodes outward around the bottle, suspended in mid-air.
Particles vary in size, from fine powder to small chunks, creating a dynamic radial motion.

The bottle remains intact, with no cracks or damage.
The label is clean, centered, sharp, and fully legible, clearly separated from the surrounding dust.

The entire scene is shot in a controlled studio environment, not outdoors.
Background is dark and neutral, fading into black, with no visible horizon or landscape.

Lighting is dramatic studio lighting, directional and high-contrast, emphasizing:

the texture of the soil

the glass reflections

the suspended particles

The motion is completely frozen, resembling high-speed photography.
No motion blur, no camera movement.

Do not add text, logos, extra elements, or stylization.
Maintain a premium, cinematic, advertising-quality look.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
The bottle is shown rotating in mid-air, lifting away from the ground.

Earth particles and dust remain suspended around it, frozen in motion.
No ground is visible in contact with the bottle.

Dramatic studio lighting with high contrast, sculpting the bottle’s form.
Clean, dark background with no environmental elements.

The label is still clearly legible and visually dominant.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value:
The bottle is breaking apart in mid-air, fragmenting into several large, clean glass pieces.

Glass shards, earth particles, and dust are all frozen in time, carefully composed and readable.
The destruction feels controlled, cinematic, and elegant, not chaotic.

High-contrast studio lighting enhances glass edges, particles, and reflections.
Dark, minimal background.

Parts of the label may be fragmented but remain recognizable and premium.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.value: The bottle lifts from the impact point and floats upward, rotating slowly in mid-air. Dust, soil, and stone fragments continue to orbit around it, trailing motion and inertia from the previous impact. The bottle spins on its axis, perfectly readable label, controlled rotation, weighty and elegant. Lighting remains consistent: dramatic studio key light, subtle volumetric dust illuminated, black-to-dark-gray gradient background. The motion feels heavy, physical, and premium.

prompt.label: Prompt
Video Prompt
prompt.value:
Use the reference image as the first frame.
A shattered wine bottle suspended in mid-air, captured just after impact. Glass shards float slowly, rotating on their own axis, with sharp edges catching and reflecting light. Fine dust and debris particles drift in slow motion. Red wine spills into the air as droplets and thin fluid strands, with realistic liquid physics and subtle gravity.
The label remains partially intact, gently moving with the air.
Dramatic studio lighting, hard side light emphasizing glass texture, precise specular highlights, deep shadows. Dark, neutral, slightly blurred background.
Slow, controlled cinematic camera movement, subtle push-in or dolly.
Hyper-realistic style, high detail, shallow depth of field, premium advertising look.
Duration 4–6 seconds. No unrealistic deformation, no artificial smoke, no exaggerated effects.
